## Skill Area

Which existing skill or new capability is involved?

## Gap

What work currently fails, drifts, or requires too much judgment?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired decision rule, workflow, template, or evidence requirement.

## Provenance

List source material, repo links, or examples that should be considered.
